title: Peltobryon longifolium
taxonomy: Peltobryon longifolium is classified as a species of moss in the family Pottiaceae, which is a family of leafy mosses. It belongs to the genus Peltobryon, which consists of several species of mosses. Peltobryon longifolium is a type of pleurocarpous moss, meaning it produces its spores on the sides of the stem. The classification of Peltobryon longifolium is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Bryophyta, class Bryopsida, order Pottiales, family Pottiaceae, genus Peltobryon, and species P. longifolium. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships.
